about.title: About
about.description: Arcway is a modern, open-source app store for Arch Linux. It provides a unified graphical interface to discover, install, update, and remove software from three sources: Flatpak (Flathub), AUR (via Yay), and AUR (via Paru).
about.appimageManager: It also features a unique AppImage manager that allows you to install .AppImage files as native desktop applications with proper icons and menu entries.
about.licenseText: Arcway is licensed under the MIT License. Copyright (c) 2025 Arcway Contributors.
